title: DU E-Commerce Mobile Application
description: Enterprise telecom e-commerce ecosystem for Consumer, Dealer, and Courier applications. Built cross-platform mobile apps with role-based authentication, order management, inventory tracking, delivery workflows, and real-time updates.

title: NC Gen AI - Telecom Solution
description: AI-powered telecom platform that automates customer support, knowledge retrieval, and business workflows using Generative AI. Developed scalable frontend and backend services with AI integrations.

title: DU E-Commerce Web Platform
description: Telecom-focused e-commerce platform enabling customers to browse, purchase, and manage telecom products. Built with Next.js using SSR/SSG, GraphQL, and scalable Node.js APIs.

title: SVB Payment Dashboard
description: Cloud-native payment operations dashboard for Silicon Valley Bank with maker-checker approvals, payment reconciliation, audit logs, advanced search, and AWS serverless architecture.

title: Successware
description: Enterprise business management platform for home service companies covering booking, dispatching, invoicing, technician tracking, and payment processing. Improved performance by over 70% and implemented real-time technician tracking.

title: Successware Mobile
description: Enterprise B2B mobile application for service-oriented businesses, enabling booking, dispatching, technician management, invoicing, and field operations. Led the successful technical handover from the ThoughtWorks China team, modernized legacy code, implemented new features, and optimized application performance for Android and iOS.

title: Mike IP Suite
description: Legal-tech platform providing trademark search, trademark monitoring, patent management, and IP portfolio management for law firms. Developed multiple production modules and REST APIs.

title: Mike DocuSieve
description: AI-powered contract drafting and review platform using React Office Add-ins for Microsoft Word and Excel, enabling intelligent document analysis and editing for legal professionals.

title: Mike Iris Mobile
description: Cross-platform mobile application for legal administrators to manage trademarks, reminders, and case notes with secure authentication and offline capabilities.

title: Mike Iris
description: Administrative web application for the IP Suite ecosystem, enabling legal teams to manage portfolios, workflows, and customer operations through an intuitive dashboard.

title: MikeLegal Website
description: AI-powered legal platform that automates trademark searching, trademark watching, IP management, and contract proofreading for legal professionals.

title: EasemyGST
description: GST compliance platform supporting multi-GSTIN filing, ERP integration, invoice processing, and e-way bill generation for businesses across India.

title: Supplymint
description: Retail inventory and Open-to-Buy planning platform enabling procurement, budgeting, inventory planning, and supply chain management for retailers.

title: NASA Mission Control
description: Mission Control dashboard developed for NASA to monitor mission activities, visualize operational data, and provide real-time insights through an interactive web interface.

title: HealthTrack
description: Healthcare management platform for hospitals and clinics with patient management, analytics dashboards, and role-based workflows built using Angular and NgRx.

title: e-MELA
description: Multi-vendor e-commerce platform supporting customers, sellers, administrators, payment processing, and checkout workflows for online shopping.

title: Online Hostel Management System
description: Web-based hostel management system for online room allocation, student registration, room management, and administrative operations.
